name: Landmine
notes: Standalone trap, not tied to any base — placed anywhere by an Engineer, like Tower/Road/Bridge/Dock. Invisible to enemies until they're within revealRange (1 hex), or instantly spotted by any detector at its full visionRange. Very low HP — once revealed/detected, a single hit from almost anything kills it before it can trigger. If an enemy Infantry/Land troop gets within range undetected, it deals its damage as a splash hit and is destroyed immediately (defensiveStats.selfDestructOnTrigger) rather than persisting as a repeating attacker. No population cost and no rebuildCost, same as other standalone buildings — destruction deletes it outright rather than leaving a ruin.
